content.text:
REVIEW-FINDING: 5.1.1(ii) WARN — NSCameraUsageDescription is generic ("This app needs camera access.") and NSLocationWhenInUseUsageDescription is a placeholder ("TODO") with no visible location feature in code (App/Info.plist:8-11).
Pierre: Apple rejects apps whose purpose strings don't explain why access is needed in terms the user can verify. The camera string should reference the document-scanning feature (ScannerView.swift triggers the prompt), and the "TODO" location string will be an outright metadata rejection — either write a specific reason or remove the key entirely since no location API usage is present.
